```mjs title=dynamic.mjs
import { __rspack_require } from "./index_js.mjs";
import "./index_js.mjs";

__rspack_require.add({
"./dynamic.js"
/*!********************!*\
  !*** ./dynamic.js ***!
  \********************/
(__unused_rspack_module, exports, __rspack_require) {
const shared = __rspack_require(/*! ./shared */ "./shared.js");

exports.value = shared.base + 41;


},
});
const dynamic = __rspack_require("./dynamic.js");
var dynamic_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(dynamic);
var dynamic_default_0 = dynamic_default();
var value = dynamic.value;

export { value };
export default dynamic_default_0;

```

```mjs title=index_js.mjs

var __rspack_modules = {};
// The module cache
var __rspack_module_cache = {};
// The require function
function __rspack_require(moduleId) {
// Check if module is in cache
var cachedModule = __rspack_module_cache[moduleId];
if (cachedModule !== undefined) {
return cachedModule.exports;
}
// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)
var module = (__rspack_module_cache[moduleId] = {
exports: {}
});
// Execute the module function
__rspack_modules[moduleId](module, module.exports, __rspack_require);

// Return the exports of the module
return module.exports;
}
// expose the modules object (__rspack_modules)
__rspack_require.m = __rspack_modules;

// webpack/runtime/compat_get_default_export
(() => {
// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-ESM modules
__rspack_require.n = (module) => {
	var getter = module && module.__esModule ?
		() => (module['default']) :
		() => (module);
	__rspack_require.d(getter, { a: getter });
	return getter;
};

})();
// webpack/runtime/create_fake_namespace_object
(() => {
var getProto = Object.getPrototypeOf ? (obj) => (Object.getPrototypeOf(obj)) : (obj) => (obj.__proto__);
var leafPrototypes;
// create a fake namespace object
// mode & 1: value is a module id, require it
// mode & 2: merge all properties of value into the ns
// mode & 4: return value when already ns object
// mode & 16: return value when it's Promise-like
// mode & 8|1: behave like require
__rspack_require.t = function(value, mode) {
	if(mode & 1) value = this(value);
	if(mode & 8) return value;
	if(typeof value === 'object' && value) {
		if((mode & 4) && value.__esModule) return value;
		if((mode & 16) && typeof value.then === 'function') return value;
	}
	var ns = Object.create(null);
  __rspack_require.r(ns);
	var def = {};
	leafPrototypes = leafPrototypes || [null, getProto({}), getProto([]), getProto(getProto)];
	for(var current = mode & 2 && value; (typeof current == 'object' || typeof current == 'function') && !~leafPrototypes.indexOf(current); current = getProto(current)) {
		Object.getOwnPropertyNames(current).forEach((key) => { def[key] = () => (value[key]) });
	}
	def['default'] = () => (value);
	__rspack_require.d(ns, def);
	return ns;
};
})();
// webpack/runtime/define_property_getters
(() => {
__rspack_require.d = (exports, getters, values) => {
	var define = (defs, kind) => {
		for(var key in defs) {
			if(__rspack_require.o(defs, key) && !__rspack_require.o(exports, key)) {
				Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, [kind]: defs[key] });
			}
		}
	};
	define(getters, "get");
	define(values, "value");
};
})();
// webpack/runtime/esm_register_module
(() => {
__rspack_require.add = function registerModules(modules) { Object.assign(__rspack_require.m, modules) }

})();
// webpack/runtime/export_webpack_require
var __rspack_requiretemp = __rspack_require;
export { __rspack_requiretemp as __rspack_require };
// webpack/runtime/has_own_property
(() => {
__rspack_require.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))
})();
// webpack/runtime/make_namespace_object
(() => {
// define __esModule on exports
__rspack_require.r = (__rspack_exports) => {
	if(typeof Symbol !== 'undefined' && Symbol.toStringTag) {
		Object.defineProperty(__rspack_exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: 'Module' });
	}
	Object.defineProperty(__rspack_exports, '__esModule', { value: true });
};

})();
// webpack/runtime/module_chunk_loading
(() => {
// no BaseURI
      // object to store loaded and loading chunks
      // undefined = chunk not loaded, null = chunk preloaded/prefetched
      // [resolve, Promise] = chunk loading, 0 = chunk loaded
      var installedChunks = {"index_js": 0,"main": 0,};
      var installChunk = (data) => {
    var __rspack_esm_ids = data.__rspack_esm_ids;
    var __rspack_modules = data.__rspack_modules;
    var __rspack_esm_runtime = data.__rspack_esm_runtime;
    // add "modules" to the modules object,
    // then flag all "ids" as loaded and fire callback
    var moduleId, chunkId, i = 0;
    for (moduleId in __rspack_modules) {
        if (__rspack_require.o(__rspack_modules, moduleId)) {
            __rspack_require.m[moduleId] = __rspack_modules[moduleId];
        }
    }
    if (__rspack_esm_runtime) __rspack_esm_runtime(__rspack_require);
    for (; i < __rspack_esm_ids.length; i++) {
        chunkId = __rspack_esm_ids[i];
        if (__rspack_require.o(installedChunks, chunkId) && installedChunks[chunkId]) {
            installedChunks[chunkId][0]();
        }
        installedChunks[__rspack_esm_ids[i]] = 0;
    }
    
};// no chunk on demand loading

        __rspack_require.C = installChunk;
        // no on chunks loaded
// no HMR
// no HMR manifest

})();

__rspack_require.add({
"./shared.js"
/*!*******************!*\
  !*** ./shared.js ***!
  \*******************/
(__unused_rspack_module, exports) {
exports.base = 1;


},
});
// ./index.js
const shared = __rspack_require("./shared.js");


const direct = shared.base;

it("should keep a single __webpack_require__ export on runtimeChunk false entry chunks", async () => {
	const mod = await import("./dynamic.mjs").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, /*! ./dynamic */ "./dynamic.js", 19));

	expect(mod.value).toBe(42);
	expect(direct).toBe(1);
});



export { direct };

```

```mjs title=main.mjs

export { direct } from "./index_js.mjs";

```
